description: Level up your holiday marketing with this classic Black Friday email template. Keep your design simple by sharing some of your top black Friday discounts. With millions of Black Friday sale emails being sent during this season, make sure that yours stands out amongst the bunch. Customize this ecommerce email template with your own brand style, colors and icons.Take advantage of the seasonal hype with this stylish email template.

designer.description: I am a graphic and web designer, as well as UX designer. I am a font fetishist, and I am obsessed with every kind of human-machine interaction. I love Italian trash music, good food and crowded metropolis.
